intro: Stelis vegrandis, also known as Stelis grandis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, reducing fever, and combating bacterial infections.
